creator: fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
text:
<precise description of the problem (multiple lines)>

	Update EMBASSY to 6.0.0 and bring it up to date with its parent
	port (biology/emboss).

	The port has been marked BROKEN, as it was failing to compile
	with the newer EMBOSS port. This update fixes this issue.

Fix: 

<how to correct or work around the problem, if known (multiple lines)>

       See attached patch

--0016364eef709df98b046bd7cad1
